---
title: "Edith Pond"
---

## Edith Pond

**Dates:** (b.1874/5)

### Description

sister of [[person:1648]Bessie Pond], housemaid

### Biography

She is found working for Maurice Yonge in the 1901 census just after CMY\'s death.  She and her sister were daughters of Francis Pond, cabinet-maker, of Wantage.

### Letters

- Letter from June 6th [1900]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
